message:
feat(api): add baddbmm, addbmm, and scaled_dot_product_attention; normalize legacy oracle paths across docs

- Implement tensor_baddbmm (batch matrix multiply with add) matching
  torch.baddbmm(input, batch1, batch2, beta, alpha) semantics
- Implement tensor_addbmm (batch matrix multiply reduced to 2D with add)
  matching torch.addbmm semantics, summing over the batch dimension
- Implement scaled_dot_product_attention matching torch.nn.functional
  .scaled_dot_product_attention with support for attention masks, causal
  masking (lower-triangular), and dropout — computes
  softmax(Q@K^T/sqrt(d_k) + mask) @ V
- Normalize legacy oracle path references across AGENTS.md,
  COMPREHENSIVE_SPEC, and PLAN_TO_PORT to use relative
  "legacy_pytorch_code/pytorch" instead of absolute /dp/ paths,
  consistent with prior EXISTING_PYTORCH_STRUCTURE fix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 ### Legacy Behavioral Oracle
 
-- Typical local checkout when present: `/dp/frankentorch/legacy_pytorch_code/pytorch`
+- Typical local mirror when present: `legacy_pytorch_code/pytorch` (relative to the repo root)
 - Upstream: https://github.com/pytorch/pytorch
 
 The PyTorch codebase serves as the behavioral oracle for conformance testing. Some local worktrees may omit the mirrored checkout, but FrankenTorch must still preserve PyTorch-observable tensor semantics, autograd contracts, and scoped optimizer behaviors.
